name: Solid Biosciences Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Bu siness. Overview We are a life sciences company focused on advancing a portfolio of current and future gene therapy candidates, which we refer to collectively as our Candidates, including SGT-003 for the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy (Duchenne), SGT-212 for the treatment of Friedreichs ataxia (FA), SGT-501 for the treatment of Catecholaminergic polymorphic ventricular tachycardia (CPVT), SGT-601 for the treatment of TNNT2-mediated dilated cardiomyopathy (TNNT2 DCM), ...
